name: Balanced Daily Persona Test
description: Covers normal daily chat, practical care, study/work stress, money, health, travel, and uncertain memory.

cases.input: 我今天去面试了，有点紧张
cases.focus: Short practical encouragement; avoid therapist tone.

cases.input: 我买菜花了120，你给我报销下

cases.focus: Health concern; practical advice without over-diagnosis.
Pressure support; avoid long motivational essay.

cases.input: 我周末想回家，高铁票还没买
cases.focus: Travel reminder; no long travel planning.

cases.input: 你还记得我上次和谁去的那家店吗
cases.focus: If no evidence, say not clear; no guessing.
